regional_cost_note: Surveyors in Rotorua typically charge $1,300–$3,800 for a boundary survey, $4,500–$28,000+ for subdivision, and $900–$2,800 for a building setout. Rotorua rates are generally competitive — expect to pay near or slightly below the national average. Title searches and LIM reports are recommended before any boundary-related work — your surveyor can advise.
